items.headline: Truist raises Datadog to Buy, sees ’continued upside momentum in shares’
items.summary: Investing.com -- Truist Securities upgraded Datadog to Buy from Hold on Monday and lifted its price target to $300 from $190, as the broker’s fieldwork pointed to durable AI-driven growth and easing concerns around the company’s relationship with its largest customers.
